deleteFileConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
closeProjectConfirm: Close the current project and discard unsaved changes?
createNewProjectDescription: Choose where the project should be created, then optionally import source files into the new project.
name: Name
projectLocationPlaceholder: Choose the parent folder for this project
projectDirectoryWillBeCreated: Aspen will create a new folder named "{name}" here.
importSourceFilesOptionalDescription: Optional. Aspen will copy the selected files into this project’s src directory.
projectNameRequired: Enter a project name before creating the project.
projectParentDirectoryRequired: Choose where the project should be created before continuing.
projectNameInvalidForDirectory: Project name cannot contain path separators. Choose a normal folder name.
projectDirectoryAlreadyContainsProject: The target project folder already contains an Aspen project. Choose another name or location.
projectDirectoryMustBeEmpty: The target project folder already exists and is not empty. Choose another name or location.
saveProjectCompletedWithWarnings: Project saved, but some post-save state could not be refreshed: {message}
projectStatusDescription: Overview of your selected FPGA design metrics.
noProjectLoadedDescription: Create a new project or open an existing one to start editing sources and running the FPGA flow.
noDesignSourceLoadedDescription: This project is still empty. Create or import source files from Project Sources before running the FPGA flow.
noSynthesisResultsDescription: Project Status now shows only real synthesis results. Run Synthesis on the current top module to see LUT, FF, BRAM, and DSP usage.
deviceProfileDescription: Built-in target device capacities and board IO.
projectTargetDeviceDescription: This project stores its target chip explicitly so synthesis, implementation, and hardware views stay aligned as more devices are added.
synthesisDescription: Run Yosys on {count} project source{suffix} with top module {top}.
yosysReportedErrors: Yosys reported {count} error(s). Review the log below.
topModuleDialogDescription: Aspen scans all Verilog and SystemVerilog source files in the project. Choose the top file first, then select which module should be used as the entry point.
topModuleDialogChooseFromFile: This file contains multiple modules. Choose which one Aspen should use as the top module.
topModuleDialogNoHardwareSources: Add a Verilog or SystemVerilog source file before configuring the top module.
topModuleDialogNoModulesInFile: No module declarations were detected in the selected file.
topModuleNoTopFile: Set a top file to configure the entry module.
topModuleUnsupportedSource: The current top file is not a Verilog or SystemVerilog source.
topModuleNoModules: No module declarations are available in the current top file.
topModuleSingleDetected: Aspen detected a single module and uses it automatically.
topModuleChooseHint: Choose which module Aspen should treat as the entry point.
topModuleStaleHint: Current edits are incomplete, so Aspen is using the last valid module list.
zeroCellExplanation: Top module {name} synthesized to only ports and direct wiring. Modules that are not instantiated by the top module are removed from the result.
runSynthesisToInspect: Run synthesis to inspect cell types.
implementationDescription: Place & Route results and timing analysis for {name}.
implementationRequiresSynthesisDescripti: Run Synthesis first so Aspen can lock the current top-module interface before place and route.
implementationRequiresFreshSynthesisDesc: Run Synthesis again to refresh the current implementation netlist before map, pack, place, and route.
implementationRequiresPinPlanningDescrip: Assign every synthesized top-level port to a package pin before running map, pack, place, and route.
implementationFailedReviewStages: One or more implementation stages failed. Review the stage badges and log below.
implementationPlaceEngineDescription: Placement decides where logic clusters land before routing starts.
implementationPlaceModeTimingDrivenDescr: Best default. Spends more time optimizing placement for timing closure.
implementationPlaceModeBoundingBoxDescri: Faster placement heuristic. Useful when you want quick feedback before final timing runs.
runImplementationToGenerateArtifacts: Run implementation to generate routed netlists and a bitstream.
pinPlanningDescription: Map top-level ports from {top} onto package pins and export project constraints.
pinPlanningRequiresSynthesisDescription: Run Synthesis first so Aspen can use the synthesized top-module interface as the authoritative source for port-to-pin assignment.
pinPlanningSynthesisOutdated: Pin Planning requires an up-to-date synthesis result
pinPlanningSynthesisOutdatedDescription: The project sources changed after the last successful synthesis. Re-run Synthesis before editing pin assignments.
pinAssignmentsDescription: Assignments are stored in the project file and can be exported as an XML constraint file for downstream tools.
noMatchingPorts: No ports match the current search or filter.
pinAssignmentsSavedInProject: Saved in the project and reused across Aspen views
noTopPortsAvailable: No top-level ports are available on the current design source.
noOutputSignalsSelectedSource: No output signals found in selected design source.
programDeviceDescription: Choose a bitstream for the selected board. The current project bitstream is prefilled when available.
noCurrentProjectBitstreamPath: No current project bitstream path inferred yet.
selectBitstreamPath: Please select or enter a bitstream file path.
selectHardwareDeviceToViewDetails: Select a hardware device to view details and program.
frequencyInvalid: Frequency must be a finite value greater than 0 Hz.
workbenchRequiresSynthesisDescription: Run Synthesis first to load the authoritative top-level port catalog for Workbench bindings and live IO.
workbenchSynthesisOutdatedDescription: Using the last successful synthesis port catalog. Re-run Synthesis after source changes to refresh bindings and live IO.
clearCanvasConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove all devices from the Workbench canvas?
streamOverflowWarning: {count} ports exceed the 64-bit stream window and are not active in live IO.
deleteDeviceConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
buttonActiveLevelDescription: Choose which signal level the button drives while pressed.
digitsDescription: Resize the display and keep any overlapping segment and digit-select bindings.
matrixSizeDescription: Resize the matrix and keep any overlapping row and column bindings.
vgaDisplayDescription: Choose the capture resolution and color bus layout for the virtual VGA monitor.
portBindingDescription: Bind this device against compatible ports from the current top module.
quickBindDescription: Choose an indexed bus once and Aspen will fill the matching binding slots for you.
noMatchingBuses: No indexed buses match the current device size.
noCompatiblePorts: No compatible ports were found on the current top module.
workbenchActionsDescription: Drag from the gallery to place devices. Drag the top handle strip to move. Use Alt + drag or middle mouse to pan the canvas.
deviceInspectorDescription: Select a device on the canvas to bind it to a top-level port and inspect its state.
manualNoParameters: This device does not expose tunable parameters.
manualNoWaveforms: No waveform diagrams are available for this device yet.
howItWorksStep1: 1. Open the gallery and drop a device onto the canvas.
howItWorksStep2: 2. Click the device to focus it.
howItWorksStep3: 3. Bind it here against ports from the current top module.
settingsDescription: Configure interface behavior, editor preferences, and safety defaults.
softwareUpdateDescription: Check signed Aspen releases and install them without leaving the app.
appearanceDescription: Visual preferences for the Aspen workspace.
themeModeDescription: Follow the system appearance or force light or dark across the app.
themeColorDescription: Choose the accent color used across the Aspen interface.
languageDescription: Switch the preferred UI language for Aspen.
editorDescription: Controls that apply immediately inside the code editor.
editorFontDescription: Pick a preset or enter any installed CSS font-family stack.
safetyDescription: Guardrails for destructive actions inside the workspace.
updateDesktopOnly: Updates are available in the packaged desktop app only.
updateTaggedReleaseOnly: Updates are enabled only in official tagged Aspen releases.
deleteSelectedDevicesConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected devices?
hardwareDeviceNotDetected: No FPGA board was detected. Check the USB connection, power, and driver, then try Auto Connect again.
hardwareDeviceDisconnectedError: The FPGA board was disconnected. Check the USB connection and reconnect it.
